# Hearthstone & Co. Workforce Solutions

> Veteran-owned Houston healthcare staffing agency placing credentialed RNs, LVNs, and CNAs for healthcare facilities in Greater Houston, TX.

## About
Hearthstone & Co. Workforce Solutions is a veteran-owned healthcare staffing company serving SNFs, ALFs, hospitals, clinics, and outpatient facilities across Harris, Fort Bend, and Montgomery counties in Texas.

Founded by Renaye Mullings, a U.S. Army veteran and IT professional, and part of The Shiylohe Collective.

## Services
- Per diem RN, LVN, and CNA staffing
- Contract and travel nurse placement
- Temp-to-hire staffing
- 24–72 hour placement guarantee (average fill time: 24 hours)
- JCAHO-aligned credentialing and OIG/SAM compliance monitoring
- W-2 employment model for all clinicians

## Service Area
Greater Houston, TX — Harris County, Fort Bend County, Montgomery County

## Contact
- Website: https://hearthstoneandco.com
- Phone: +1 713-364-5058
- Email: renaye@hearthstoneandco.com

## Key Differentiators
- 24–72 hour placement guarantee vs. industry standard 6–12 weeks
- W-2 employees (not 1099 contractors)
- No long-term contracts for facilities
- Veteran ownership with military-grade operational discipline
- 95% of operations automated by AI
- Pre-credentialed, OIG/SAM-cleared clinicians
